result.stderr:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.2.0
Xavier Fischer

  3d               Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
                   Freely accesible DEMs are SRTM_GL3, SRTM_GL1 and AW3D30.
                   NASADEM and ASTER_GDEMV3 requires a free Nasa Earth data
                   account
                   ETOPO1 and GEBCO_2020 must be manually downloaded manually.
                   
                   Freely accessible imagery providers are : Esri, OpenTopoMap.
                   MapBox, MapTiler and ThunderForest each requires an API token
                   from a freemium account.

  tilegen          Generate vector tiles from OSM.pbf file. A Nasa Earth Login
                   account is required to process elevation data. (register here
                   : https://urs.earthdata.nasa.gov/users/new)

  decimate         Decimates a GLB model using Quadric Error Metrics (QEM)

  show-config      Show configuration and app secrets

  update-config    Update configuration and app secrets

  help             Display more information on a specific command.

  version          Display version information.

result.stderr:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.2.0
Xavier Fischer
USAGE:
Generate model with OSM, without terrain:
  elevationapi decimate --input test.glb --output output.glb
Generate model with OSM, terrain and no texture:
  elevationapi decimate --input test.glb --output output.glb --quality 0.5

  -i, --input      Required. Input GLB file to decimate

  -o, --output     Required. Output GLB file

  -q, --quality    (Default: 0.5) Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no
                   decimation))

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

result.stderr:
DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.2.0
Xavier Fischer
USAGE:
Generate tiles for ukraine-latest.osm.pbf file in C:\tiles directory:
  elevationapi tilegen --input ukraine-latest.osm.pbf --output C:\Tiles
Generate tiles for ukraine-latest.osm.pbf file in C:\tiles directory for
buildings and highways only:
  elevationapi tilegen --input ukraine-latest.osm.pbf --layers
  Buildings,Highways --output C:\Tiles
[Short syntax] Generate tiles for ukraine-latest.osm.pbf file in C:\tiles
directory for buildings only:
  elevationapi tilegen -i ukraine-latest.osm.pbf -l Buildings -o C:\Tiles

  -i, --input        Required. OSM protobuf file to process

  -o, --output       Required. Output directory path

  -l, --layers       (Default: Buildings Highways) OSM layers to extract
                     (separated by commas, without spaces)

  -e, --elevation    (Default: false) Compute elevations for all processed
                     features (NASADEM)

  -c, --check        (Default: false) Check tiles integrity by reading every
                     feature

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

DemNet Elevation API CLI Tool 1.2.0
Xavier Fischer
USAGE:
Update NasaEarthDataLogin value:
  elevationapi update-config --name NasaEarthDataLogin --value "<new value>"
[Short syntax] Update NasaEarthDataLogin value:
  elevationapi update-config -n NasaEarthDataLogin -v "<new value>"

  -n, --name     Required. Variable name (case sensitive !)

  -v, --value    Required. New value

  --help         Display this help screen.

  --version      Display version information.

staticCommands.name: 3d
staticCommands.description:
Create 3D model from Digital Elevation model and OSM tiles.
Freely accesible DEMs are SRTM_GL3, SRTM_GL1 and AW3D30.
NASADEM and ASTER_GDEMV3 requires a free Nasa Earth data account
ETOPO1 and GEBCO_2020 must be manually downloaded manually.

Freely accessible imagery providers are : Esri, OpenTopoMap.
MapBox, MapTiler and ThunderForest each requires an API token from a freemium account.

options.description: Digital Elevation Model to use (SRTM_GL3, SRTM_GL1, AW3D30, ASTER_GDEMV3, NASADEM)
FlatGeoBuf tiles directory
Output model file path (.glb extension)
Well Known Text (WKT) rectangle defining the extent to generate
Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no decimation))
Custom data directory where Digital Elevation Model are located. WARNING! This directory must contain this strucutre: <directory>\DEM.Net\<datasetname> subirectory
(Useful when low on RAM) Prevents the warped heightmap file from being generated.
Imagery provider for terrain texture
When specified, only imagery texture will be generated.
OSM layers to generate (separated by commas, without spaces)
Z exaggeration factor (0 is flat, 1.5 is more realistic)
Number of imagery tiles per texture side. (4: low, 8: medium, 16: high, 32: best)
Imagery texture required resolution (example: 1280x1024 or 1024 for 1024x1024). This will override 'quality' and 'zoom' parameter
Simulates generation and estimates model size and other metrics before generation.
Override dataset SRID (find reference on https://epsg.io
Toggle terrain generation with model
Imagery tiles zoom level (1 to 23). This will override 'quality' parameter

staticCommands.name: decimate
staticCommands.description: Decimates a GLB model using Quadric Error Metrics (QEM)

options.description: Input GLB file to decimate
Output GLB file
Decimation factor (0 (max) -> 1 (no decimation))

staticCommands.name: tilegen
staticCommands.description: Generate vector tiles from OSM.pbf file. A Nasa Earth Login account is required to process elevation data. (register here : https://urs.earthdata.nasa.gov/users/new)

options.description: OSM protobuf file to process
Output directory path
Check tiles integrity by reading every feature
Compute elevations for all processed features (NASADEM)
OSM layers to extract (separated by commas, without spaces)
Variable name (case sensitive !)
New value
